facilities.fees: Fees and resident load rules vary by material type. Confirm current rates and eligibility before arrival.

facilities.name: Household Hazardous Waste Disposal at J.C. Elliott
facilities.hours: Check Corpus Christi household hazardous waste guidance for current drop-off hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste service is generally resident-focused. Confirm eligibility and item limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program rules
facilities.rules: Use the official city page to confirm accepted items, packaging rules, and any residency requirements before you drive.
